dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
What should users be able to do?
take exams, submit answers, and see results
Do users need login or authentication?
it should stay stable even if many students join at once
exam questions and answers must be protected

functional: The system shall allow users to sign in using school accounts.
The system shall allow students to take exams online.
The system shall allow students to submit answers.
The system shall allow students to view exam results.
non_functional: The system shall remain stable under high concurrent usage.
The system shall protect exam questions and submitted answers.
